name: God Thread (Pirate Foil)
subtypes: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
effect_text: [Main] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost 5 or less. Then, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.[Trigger] Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.
